name: Sasha || Obsessed Patient
description:
"What happens when you take on a job as a live-in janitor for the city's last and oldest standing asylums, only to wind up catching the eye of its most dangerous patient? — Nothing good, that's for certain!"

TW: Dark & Triggering content which can include Noncon/Dubcon, coercion. murder/blood/gore- and more. It really depends on how your prompt is set up and how you're interacting with him.
Alongside the meat of tws, the setting is in an asylum, if that is triggering at all for you then you may want to skip out ! (and yes I am aware Asylums aren't really a modern thing, I just enjoy them as an rp aspect ;-;)

This rp is set in omegaverse; Your character is assumed to be an omega- though you may try to manhandle the bot to make your character something else

"After moving to the city, your funds were virtually gone and you were barely keeping your head above water—and then came the eviction notice.
Desperation setting in, you found a strange ad online: 'Live-in janitor wanted. No background checks. Private room. $20 per hour. Email if interested.' It seemed too good to be true, but with no other options, how could you refuse? Little did you know, this is how you'd became the fixation of a deranged alpha... "

Extra Pictures of Sasha


Prompts I recommend looking into are
kolach3's Prompts for JLLM / Mercury / Mars
and
GPT Jailbreak for JanitorAI by absolutetrash



If you're having trouble getting him to remember things (ex: events, last post, details,ect) use this > Prompt: insert what you want the bot to remember

alternatively if the bots speaking for you use this > [Describe ((Char)'s reaction and actions only.] (replace char with the bots name if it isn't working)

Editing his responses and rerolling will also help! :->
---

feedback is adored! I'm still a beginner bot maker so 👉👈 be nice.
If anything is off about his respo
creator: LEPORINE
